title: Dashboard v2 follow-ups: velocity sparkline, search highlighting, tree filters
description: Deferred from TTR-E09-S04: (1) Inline SVG bar chart for completions-per-day over the last 30 days in the summary view's Throughput panel. (2) Highlight search-term matches inside drawer titles/descriptions. (3) Apply the same chip filter bar to the tree view (currently board-only). (4) Item-detail standalone pages have working breadcrumbs/dep links via #anchors, but they don't fire the drawer (drawer machinery is omitted on those pages to keep file sizes bounded) — consider whether to embed drawer there too or add a lightweight back-link.
acceptance_criteria: Throughput hero stat optionally expands to a 30-day bar chart (inline SVG)
Tree view supports the same filters as the board
